summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM SaaS system. Backend APIs are fully functional with proper authentication. Frontend loads correctly with Google OAuth integration, theme toggle, and route protection working. All requested features tested successfully.
passed_tests: API health check at /api/ returns 200 with healthy status
API endpoint /api/pipeline-stages requires authentication (401 when unauthorized)
API endpoint /api/leads requires authentication (401 when unauthorized)
API endpoint /api/dashboard/stats requires authentication (401 when unauthorized)
Frontend login page loads correctly with proper styling
Google OAuth button is properly displayed and rendered
Theme toggle functionality works (light/dark mode switching)
Route protection works - unauthenticated users redirected to login
Navigation protection works for all protected routes
CORS headers properly configured for API access
Frontend design elements working (glass effects, gradients, typography)
